name: fabricator
description: Fabricator helps create, maintain, publish, and observe reliable Codex plugins.

interface.shortDescription: Create, maintain, and publish Codex plugins.
interface.longDescription: Fabricator helps turn plugin ideas and existing Codex plugins into clear, testable workflows. Craft handles local creation and maintenance. Publish handles public release preparation, package evidence, and runtime publication checks. Watch handles post-public usage monitoring and backlog intake.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Fabricator for Codex plugin creation, publishing, monitoring, and runtime updates.
